# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use the root `AGENTS.md` as the canonical repository guidance for
MorseRunnerXPlat.

Copilot-specific notes:

- Reusable project workflows live in `.agents\skills\`.
- Native Copilot adapters remain under `.github\`.
- Treat `.codex\` as Codex runtime configuration, not Copilot source material.
- Keep GitHub Actions and repository automation under `.github\`.
- Do not duplicate durable repository rules here. Update `AGENTS.md` instead.
